items.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
items.description: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonco...

items.title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
items.description: Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023. Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to mimic the movements you were making in real life. You could also run around with people on the call in a sha...

items.title: Enshittification

"It's no joke about the explosive diarrhea," Bryan, who asked that his last name be withhe...
